metadata.name: CodeBlock
metadata.description: Syntax-highlighted fenced code block with optional filename caption, line numbers, line highlighting, copy-to-clipboard button, and scrollable max-height region. Web converter highlights via Shiki at SSG time; iOS/Android may render plain monospace or ship a lighter highlighter later.

items.name: code
items.description: Raw source code to render. Rendered verbatim; no interpolation is performed. Multi-line strings are permitted and expected.

items.name: language
items.description: Syntax highlighting language identifier (Shiki grammar id). Common values: 'json', 'jsonc', 'tsx', 'ts', 'js', 'swift', 'kotlin', 'bash', 'html', 'css'. Required for deterministic highlighting; pass 'text' to disable.

items.name: filename
items.description: Optional caption rendered above the block (e.g. 'src/app/page.tsx'). When omitted, no caption is shown.

items.name: showLineNumbers
items.description: Render a left-side line-number gutter. Defaults to false.

items.name: startLine
items.description: First line number when showLineNumbers is true. Defaults to 1. Useful when showing an excerpt from the middle of a larger file.

items.name: highlightLines
items.description: One-indexed line numbers to visually emphasize (e.g. added/changed lines). Indexing is relative to the code prop itself, not to startLine.

items.name: wrapLines
items.description: Soft-wrap long lines instead of horizontal scrolling. Defaults to false (long lines overflow horizontally with the copy button still pinned).

items.name: copyable
items.description: Render a copy-to-clipboard button in the top-right corner. Copy handling itself is built into the Web converter; this prop only toggles the button's visibility. Defaults to true.

items.name: maxHeight
items.description: Maximum rendered height in pixels; when set, the code region becomes vertically scrollable once content exceeds this height. Omit for unbounded height.

items.name: theme
items.description: Optional per-instance Shiki theme override (e.g. 'github-light', 'github-dark', 'nord'). Defaults to the project-wide theme pair configured by the converter.

notes: All rendering is static at build time on Web (Shiki SSG). No client-side highlighter is shipped.
iOS/Android initial implementation may render plain monospace text and ignore language/theme/highlightLines; props must still validate against this contract so spec references are portable.
CodeBlock is a leaf component. Children passed in a Layout JSON are ignored. Content is supplied exclusively via the 'code' prop.

components.description: Root container of the code block (caption + code region + copy button)

internalStates.name: copied
internalStates.description: True for a short window after the user clicks the copy button; drives the 'Copied!' affordance. Implementation detail of the converter; not part of the public props contract.

exposedEvents.name: onCopy
exposedEvents.description: Fired after the copy-to-clipboard action succeeds. Payload is the exact string that was placed on the clipboard. Intended for analytics; copying itself is built into the converter and does not depend on this handler being wired up.

example.description: Minimal CodeBlock usage inside a Layout JSON. See docs/plans/17-spec-templates.md §T4 for a fuller CLI-page context.

notes: Spec-first discipline: this spec MUST exist and validate before .jsonui-doc-rules.json registers 'CodeBlock' in componentTypes.screen; the converter is then generated via `jui g converter --from codeblock.component.json` (later implementer step, not authored here).
Web converter depends on the 'shiki' package already present in jsonui-doc-web/package.json.
